reasoning: The document exhibits excellent content preservation, evidenced by a 1.0 content score and high programmatic text match (shingling recall 0.962). However, a major structural defect was identified where bulleted lists inside agenda items were flattened into plain text with Unicode bullet characters instead of proper structural list elements. According to the binding routing rules, this single major defect necessitates human review for structural correction.

concerns.analysis: The source PDF contains bulleted lists within the agenda items (e.g., under 'Project Finance Update'). In the JSON output, these lists are extracted as plain text using literal Unicode bullet characters (\u2022) separated by newlines within the table cell text strings, rather than being converted to proper structural list elements or valid markdown list syntax (such as asterisks or hyphens at the start of the line).
